n: Chapter 17.4: In the Shadow of Kasukhín

steps.t: Sigileth and Cúridwan intended to set up camp on the island that holds the ruins of Kasukhín, but the bridge leading there lies beyond Starkhaven.
Sigileth is by the camp-fire at Fearwater Notch, on the island of Kasukhín.
Cúridwan went to perform an investigation north-east of Fearwater Notch, on the shore of Kasukhín.
Cúridwan stands by the water's edge north-east of Fearwater Notch.
You should return to Fearwater Notch with news of Cúridwan's investigation.
Sigileth stands at Fearwater Notch, awaiting news.
